cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about figuring out the possible time Thomas could have gone to the football field. Let me try to break down the information given. First, we know Thomas woke up at 8am. Then there are several people who saw him doing different things at different times. Let me list out those times: - David saw Thomas fixing his computer from 8am to 10am. - Jennifer saw him buying lunch from 10am to 12pm. - Lisa saw him walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. - Sarah saw him buying a phone from 2pm to 5pm. - Kimberly saw him buying a bike from 6pm to 9pm.
